debug_info.goal:
case refine_2.refine_2
α : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mR : MeasurableSpace R
inst✝⁶ : Nonempty α
inst✝⁵ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁴ : DecidableEq α
inst✝³ : Countable α
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace R
inst✝¹ : Nonempty R
alg : Algorithm α R
ν : Kernel α R
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
n : ℕ
⊢ Measure.map
      (fun x =>
        ((@Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg x n,
            @Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x),
          x.2
            (pullCount (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg)
              (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x) (n + 1) x)
            (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x)))
      (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν) =
    (Measure.map
          (fun ω =>
            (@Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg ω n,
              @Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) ω))
          (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν)).compProd
      (Kernel.prodMkLeft (↥(Iic n) → α × R) ν)

      rfl

      simp [h_map]
      rw [← algFunction_map alg n (hist alg x n)]

    apply indepFun_fst_add_one_hist
  have h_map : (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) =
      (volume : Measure I).prod ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))) := by
    rw [indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map] at h_indep
    exact h_indep
  rw [← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp_rw [h_map]
  have : (fun x ↦ (x.2.1, x.2.2, x.2 (pullCount (action alg) x.2.2 (n + 1) x) x.2.2)) =
      (fun p ↦ (p.1, p.2, p.1.2 (pullCount (action alg) p.2 (n + 1) (p.1.1, p.1.2)) p.2)) ∘
        (fun x ↦ (x.1 (n + 1), hist alg x n, action alg (n + 1) x)) := rfl
  rw [this, ← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp [Measure.prod_apply, Kernel.prodMkLeft_apply, pullCount_eq_pullCount']

  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))
      (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply indepFun_fst_add_one_hist
  sorry
exact h_cond

rw [h_pull_val]
        have h_stream_eval : (Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map (fun h ↦ h (pullCount' n (hist alg · n) p.2) p.2) = ν p.2 := by
          exact (hasLaw_eval_eval_streamMeasure ν (pullCount' n (hist alg · n) p.2) p.2).map_eq
        rw [h_stream_eval]
        rfl
  exact h_final

exact Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply indepFun_fst_add_one_hist
  sorry

have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))
      (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    have h1 : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (hist alg · n) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
      indepFun_fst_add_one_hist alg ν n
    have h2 : action alg (n + 1) = fun ω ↦ algFunction alg n (hist alg ω n) (ω.1 (n + 1)) :=
      action_add_one_eq alg n
    rw [h2] at ⊢
    exact h1.comp_right (by fun_prop)
  have h_map : (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) =
      (volume : Measure I).prod ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))) := by
    rw [indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)] at h_indep
    exact h_indep
  have h_reward : reward alg (n + 1) = fun ω ↦ ω.2 (pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω))
      (action alg (n + 1) ω) := by
    ext ω
    simp [reward_eq, pullCount_eq_pullCount']
  rw [h_reward]
  have h_cond : ∀ a, (arrayMeasure ν)[|{ω | action alg (n + 1) ω = a}] =
      (arrayMeasure ν)[|{ω | (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω) ∈ Prod.snd ⁻¹' {a}}] := by
    intro a
    congr
    ext ω
    simp
  have h_pull : ∀ ω, pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω) =
      pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω := by
    intro ω
    rw [pullCount_eq_pullCount']
    rfl
  have h_stream : (arrayMeasure ν).snd = Bandit.streamMeasure ν := by
    rw [arrayMeasure, Measure.snd_prod]
  have h_eval : ∀ a k, (Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map (fun h ↦ h k a) = ν a := by
    intro a k
    rw [Bandit.streamMeasure, Measure.infinitePi_map_eval, Measure.infinitePi_map_eval]
  have h_indep_stream : ∀ a k, IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 k) (fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    intro a k
    exact indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω k) (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → R ↦ ω k a)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  calc
    (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω),
      ω.2 (pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω)) (action alg (n + 1) ω)))
    = (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω),
        (fun h : ℕ → α → R ↦ h (pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω))
          (action alg (n + 1) ω)) ω.2)) := by
      rfl
    _ = ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))).compProd
        (ν.prodMkLeft _) := by
      -- Use the independence between the randomness used for actions and the reward stream
      -- The key is that pullCount' depends only on hist and action, which are determined by the first component
      -- and the reward stream is independent
      sorry

exact Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))
      (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply indepFun_fst_add_one_hist
  sorry

have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))
      (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply indepFun_fst_add_one_hist
  have h_map : (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) =
      (volume : Measure I).prod ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))) := by
    rw [indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map] at h_indep
    exact h_indep
  simp_rw [← h_map]
  congr
  ext x : 1
  simp only [Kernel.prodMkLeft_apply, Kernel.deterministic_comp_eq_map, Function.comp_apply]
  rw [Measure.map_map]
  rfl

sorry
  exact h_cond

have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))
      (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply indepFun_fst_add_one_hist
  have h_map : (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) =
      (volume : Measure I).prod ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))) := by
    rw [indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map] at h_indep
    exact h_indep
  rw [← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp_rw [h_map]
  have h_kernel : ∀ x, (volume : Measure I).map (algFunction alg n x.1) = alg.policy n x.1 := by
    intro x
    exact algFunction_map alg n x.1
  have h_pull : ∀ ω, pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω =
      pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω) := by
    intro ω
    exact pullCount_eq_pullCount' (R' := reward alg) (by simp) ω
  simp_rw [h_pull]
  have h_cond : ∀ a, (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) a) a) = ν a := by
    intro a
    have h_meas : Measurable (fun ω ↦ (ω.1, hist alg ω n)) := by fun_prop
    have h_indep_snd : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1) (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
      indepFun_fst_snd ν
    calc
      (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) a) a)
        = (Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω (pullCount' n (hist alg · n) a) a) := by
          rw [arrayMeasure, Measure.snd_prod, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      _ = ν a := by
          have h_iid : iIndepFun (fun p ω ↦ ω p.1 p.2) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
            iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν
          have h_marg : ∀ m, (Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω m a) = ν a :=
            by simp [hasLaw_eval_eval_streamMeasure]
          exact h_marg (pullCount' n (hist alg · n) a)
  have h_final : ∀ x, ((volume : Measure I).prod (Measure.dirac x)).map
      (fun p ↦ (x, p.1, p.2 (pullCount' n x.1 x.2) x.2)) =
      (Measure.dirac x).compProd (ν.prodMkLeft x.1) := by
    intro x
    ext s hs
    simp only [Measure.prod_apply, lintegral_dirac, Measure.compProd_apply,
      Kernel.prodMkLeft_apply, Measure.map_apply]
    congr
    ext y
    simp only [Set.indicator_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have h_y : y = (x, y.2.1, y.2.2) := by
      cases y
      rfl
    rw [h_y]
    simp
  have h_main : (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω),
      ω.2 (pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω)) (action alg (n + 1) ω))) =
      ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))).compProd
        (ν.prodMkLeft) := by
    have h_repr : (fun ω ↦ ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω),
        ω.2 (pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω)) (action alg (n + 1) ω))) =
      (fun p ↦ (p.2, p.1.2 (pullCount' n p.2.1 p.2.2) p.2.2)) ∘
        (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) := by
      ext ω
      simp
    rw [h_repr, ← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), h_map]
    have h_kernel_prod : (volume : Measure I).prod ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))) =
      ((Kernel.const _ volume) ×ₖ Kernel.id) ∘ₘ ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))) := by
      rw [Measure.compProd_const, Measure.compProd_eq_comp_prod]
    rw [h_kernel_prod, Measure.comp_assoc]
    ext x
    simp only [Kernel.comp_apply, Kernel.prod_apply, Kernel.const_apply, Kernel.id_apply]
    have h_x : x = (x.1, x.2) := by
      cases x
      rfl
    rw [h_x]
    simp
    have h_apply : (ν.prodMkLeft x.1) = (fun a ↦ ν a) := by
      ext a
      simp [Kernel.prodMkLeft_apply]
    rw [h_apply]
    have h_map_eq : (volume : Measure I).map (fun u ↦ (x.1, u, (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (pullCount' n x.1 u) u) (u, x.2))) =
      (Measure.dirac x).compProd (ν.prodMkLeft x.1) := by
      simp
      have h_u : ∀ u, (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (pullCount' n x.1 u) u) (u, x.2) = x.2 (pullCount' n x.1 u) u := by
        intro u
        rfl
      rw [h_u]
      have h_final_apply : (volume : Measure I).map (fun u ↦ (x.1, u, x.2 (pullCount' n x.1 u) u)) =
        (Measure.dirac x).compProd (ν.prodMkLeft x.1) := by
        apply h_final
      exact h_final_apply
    exact h_map_eq
  exact h_main

have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))
      (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply indepFun_of_indepFun_left
    · exact indepFun_fst_add_one_hist alg ν n
    · exact measurable_action alg (n + 1)
  have h_cond : (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)) =
      (volume : Measure I).prod ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))) := by
    rw [indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)] at h_indep
    rw [h_indep]
    congr
    simp only [arrayMeasure]
    calc ((Measure.infinitePi fun x ↦ volume).prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).map (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
    _ = (Measure.infinitePi fun x ↦ volume).map (Function.eval (n + 1)) := by
      nth_rw 2 [← Measure.fst_prod (μ := Measure.infinitePi fun x ↦ volume)
        (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)]
      rw [Measure.fst, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      rfl
    _ = volume := by rw [Measure.infinitePi_map_eval]
  have h_pull : ∀ ω, pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω =
      pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω) := by
    intro ω
    rw [pullCount_eq_pullCount' (R' := reward alg) (by simp)]
    simp [Nat.add_one_sub_one]
  rw [h_pull]
  have h_map : (arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω,
      ω.2 (pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω)) (action alg (n + 1) ω))) =
    ((arrayMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))).compProd
      (ν.prodMkLeft _) := by
    have h_snd : (arrayMeasure ν).snd = Bandit.streamMeasure ν := by
      rw [arrayMeasure, Measure.snd_prod]
    rw [arrayMeasure, Measure.prod.map_prod_mk, h_snd]
    refine Measure.map_congr (ae_of_all _ _)
    intro ω
    rfl
  rw [h_map]

sorry
    sorry
  exact h_map

exact h_eq _
  exact h_cond_distr

sorry
  exact h_cond
exact h_cond
